name: Cold Sesame Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the noodles in a large pot of well-salted water until tender. Drain thoroughly in cold water and drain again.
2. Toss the noodles with the sesame oil. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
3. Mince the fresh chili pepper, scallions, and cilantro.
4. Peel and seed the cucumber and cut into fine julienne strips.
5. In a large bowl, combine the sesame paste, peanut butter, vinegar, Hunan Pepper Sauce, chili, sugar, chicken broth, and white pepper. Add the cold noodles and toss well.
6. Add the cucumbers, scallions, and cilantro. Toss again and serve.
